field.label: Enabled
field.help: Enable this AmneziaWG tunnel

field.label: Interface Number
field.help: Interface suffix number (0-99). Interface will be named awg{N}. Default: 0 (awg0).

field.label: Name
field.help: Alphanumeric name for the tunnel interface (e.g. awg0), max 15 chars

field.label: Private Key
field.help: Your private key. Use the gear button to generate a new keypair.

field.label: Tunnel Address
field.help: Interface address assigned by the server, e.g. 10.8.1.2/24

field.label: DNS
field.help: DNS servers (comma-separated). Leave empty to use OPNsense Unbound.

field.label: Listen Port
field.help: Local UDP port (optional, leave empty for random)

field.label: MTU
field.help: Leave empty for default (1420). Reduce to 1280-1380 if experiencing issues.

field.label: Jc
field.help: Number of junk packets before each handshake (1-128). From server config.

field.label: Jmin
field.help: Minimum junk packet size in bytes. From server config.

field.label: Jmax
field.help: Maximum junk packet size in bytes. From server config.

field.label: S1
field.help: Extra bytes added before init message. From server config.

field.label: S2
field.help: Extra bytes added before response message. From server config.

field.label: H1
field.help: Header ID for init packets (5-4294967295). Must differ from H2/H3/H4. From server config.

field.label: H2
field.help: Header ID for response packets (5-4294967295). Must differ from H1/H3/H4. From server config.

field.label: H3
field.help: Header ID for cookie packets (5-4294967295). Must differ from H1/H2/H4. From server config.

field.label: H4
field.help: Header ID for data packets (5-4294967295). Must differ from H1/H2/H3. From server config.

field.label: Public Key
field.help: Server public key. From server config.

field.label: Pre-Shared Key
field.help: Optional pre-shared key for additional security.

field.label: Endpoint
field.help: Server address and port, e.g. 1.2.3.4:51820

field.label: Allowed IPs
field.help: Use 0.0.0.0/0 to route all traffic through the tunnel.

field.label: Keepalive
field.help: Send keepalive every N seconds (e.g. 25). Required when behind NAT.
